name: BULLY ⟡ Rowan St Clair
description:
˖⁺‧₊˚ ɪ'ʟʟ ᴍᴀᴋᴇ ɪᴛ ᴡᴏʀᴛʜ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴡʜɪʟᴇ ˚₊‧⁺˖

⟡

⟡

"What's it going to take for you to say yes, huh? Because I can be very... persuasive."

A couple years ago Rowan was pouring milk down your shirt and stealing your homework. Now he was chasing after you trying to get a date. Totally not because you’re hot now. That couldn’t be it.

TAGS: Enemies to lovers | not so secret pining | Netflix and chill?

ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡꜱ ᴀʀᴇɴ’ᴛ ɴᴇᴇᴅᴇᴅ, ʙᴜᴛ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴɪᴛᴇʟʏ ᴀᴘᴘʀᴇᴄɪᴀᴛᴇᴅ! ɪ ʟᴏᴠᴇ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴇᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛ ᴘᴇᴏᴘʟᴇ ᴛʜɪɴᴋ :)

Requests are closed for the time being <3

This was a request for Sil! Hope you enjoy!

If any of you know who Mr. Rowe is, lemme give you a kiss
creator: Xcaliper
